name: Release
description: JSON Structure description of the Gitea Release entity.

assets.description: The files attached to the release

draft.description: Whether the release is a draft

html_url.description: The HTML URL to view the release

id.description: The unique identifier of the release

name.description: The display title of the release

prerelease.description: Whether the release is a prerelease

tag_name.description: The name of the git tag associated with the release

tarball_url.description: The URL to download the tarball archive

target_commitish.description: The target commitish for the release

upload_url.description: The URL template for uploading release assets

url.description: The API URL of the release

zipball_url.description: The URL to download the zip archive
